class.name: GLTFCollider
class.description: Represents a collider as defined by the [code]OMI_collider[/code] GLTF extension.

method.name: from_dictionary
method.description: Creates a new GLTFCollider instance by parsing the given [Dictionary].

method.name: from_node
method.description: Create a new GLTFCollider instance from the given Godot [CollisionShape3D] node.

method.name: to_dictionary
method.description: Serializes this GLTFCollider instance into a [Dictionary].

method.name: to_node
method.description: Converts this GLTFCollider instance into a Godot [CollisionShape3D] node.

members.member: The height of the collider, in meters. This is only used when the collider type is "capsule" or "cylinder". This value should not be negative.

If [code]true[/code], indicates that this collider is a trigger. For Godot, this means that the collider should be a child of an Area3D node. This is the only variable not used in the [method to_node] method, it's intended to be used alongside when deciding where to add the generated node as a child.
The radius of the collider, in meters. This is only used when the collider type is "capsule", "cylinder", or "sphere". This value should not be negative.
The type of shape this collider represents. Valid values are "box", "capsule", "cylinder", and "sphere".
The size of the collider, in meters. This is only used when the collider type is "box", and it represents the "diameter" of the box. This value should not be negative.
